items.title: GitHub Copilot App Reaches GA with Agent-Native Canvases and Cloud Automations

key_claims.claim: GA on macOS, Windows, Linux
Canvases: simultaneous human+agent editing on plan/PR/terminal
Cloud Automations: scheduled, no local machine required
No additional cost for Copilot subscribers

items.title: Mistral Launches EU Sovereign GPU Cloud with 18,000 Grace Blackwell Chips
items.date_note: Announced at VivaTech 2026 (June 17–20); exact day within event not confirmed from primary

key_claims.claim: 18,000 NVIDIA Grace Blackwell Superchips
44 MW data center, Bruyères-le-Châtel, France
€750M (~$830M) debt financing
BNP Paribas, Thales, Black Forest Labs as anchor customers

items.title: Anthropic Updates Privacy Policy to Add Biometric Identity Verification
items.date_note: Effective 2026-07-08; The Register first reported on 2026-06-15 (outside expanded window); included on basis of new Fable 5 restoration context surfacing June 20–21

key_claims.claim: Biometric collection: government ID + facial geometry templates
Effective: 8 July 2026
Scope: US-citizen Fable 5 restoration opt-in only
Third-party processor; no raw facial scan retention
key_claims.source: Anthropic privacy policy (vendor-disclosed, no independent technical audit)

caveats: No raw scan retention is vendor-stated; no independent technical verification available
Item borderline on window — see date_note

items.title: Norway Bans AI in Grades 1–7 Starting Autumn 2026

Ages 14–16: supervised use only; 17+: encouraged
Teacher use exempted
